userStory: As a customer, I want to open the Login page from the Home page and sign in with my credentials so that I can access my authenticated account experience and the additional features available after login.
This application is a single page application.
The Login page is not directly accessed by URL.
The user begins on the Home page at: http://localhost/washtabui/home The Login page/view is opened by clicking the person/profile button on the Home page.
After successful authentication, the application returns to the Home page in an authenticated state.
Ensure the Home page loads successfully in guest state.
Open the Login page by clicking the person/profile button.

The following valid credentials should be used for successful authentication scenarios: Valid Username : krisadmin Valid Password : Carwash#1 These valid credentials should be treated as approved test data for positive login scenarios in this workflow.

The Login page contains: Username field Password field Login button Password masking behavior Back button Home button These controls should be modeled as in the Login page POM/resource where appropriate, while allowing shared shell navigation controls to be reused from the upstream Home page resource when they are already owned there.

behaviorRules: As a customer, I want to open the Login page from the Home page and sign in with my credentials so that I can access my authenticated account experience and the additional features available after login.
After successful authentication, the application returns to the Home page in an authenticated state.

The following valid credentials should be used for successful authentication scenarios: Valid Username : krisadmin Valid Password : Carwash#1 These valid credentials should be treated as approved test data for positive login scenarios in this workflow.

The Login page contains: Username field Password field Login button Password masking behavior Back button Home button These controls should be modeled as in the Login page POM/resource where appropriate, while allowing shared shell navigation controls to be reused from the upstream Home page resource when they are already owned there.
The Login page should open only through the Home page person/profile button in this workflow.
Username and Password are required fields unless business behavior states otherwise.
Password input should be masked by default.
Valid credentials should authenticate the user successfully.
For positive authentication scenarios, the workflow should use the approved valid credentials: Username : krisadmin Password : Carwash#1 Invalid credentials should not authenticate the user.
Failed login should keep the user on the Login page or in the unauthenticated state, with the expected error feedback displayed.
Successful login should transition the application back to the Home page in authenticated state.
Leading and trailing spaces in entered values should be handled according to expected business behavior and must be validated.

keywordNames: Verify Guest Home Controls Are Visible And Enabled
Verify Home Page Loaded In Guest State
Verify Home Page Remains In Guest State
Verify Guest Feature Buttons Are Ready
Wait For Element To Be Ready
Open Home Page And Click User Button

keywords: Verify Guest Home Controls Are Visible And Enabled
Verify Home Page Loaded In Guest State
Verify Home Page Remains In Guest State
Verify Guest Feature Buttons Are Ready

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Login page opens from Home page using the Person/Profile button
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Login page opens from the Home page and displays the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button in an interactive state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and enabled after navigation from Home page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Login page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify password input is masked by default while typing
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Password field masks the entered characters and does not display the plain-text password value on screen.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify successful login with approved valid credentials returns the user to authenticated Home state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user successfully, returns to the Home page, removes the guest Home state, replaces the Person/Profile button with the logged-in user identity, and displays authenticated-user features.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify invalid username with valid password does not authenticate the user
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: Authentication fails, an error message is displayed, the application remains on the Login page or unauthenticated state, and authenticated Home controls are not shown.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify valid username with invalid password does not authenticate the user
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: Authentication fails, visible error feedback is displayed, and the user remains unauthenticated on the Login page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify invalid username and invalid password combination is rejected
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The login attempt is rejected with visible authentication error feedback and the application does not transition to authenticated Home state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Login button behavior when Username and Password fields are empty
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: Required field validation is displayed for Username and Password, login does not proceed, and the user remains on the Login page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify required validation when Username is empty and Password is entered
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: A Username required validation message is displayed, authentication is blocked, and the Login page remains open.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify required validation when Password is empty and Username is entered
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: A Password required validation message is displayed, login is not processed, and the user remains on the Login page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify whitespace-only Username and Password values are rejected
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application treats whitespace-only values as invalid input, prevents authentication, and displays validation or authentication error feedback while remaining on the Login page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify leading and trailing spaces in valid credentials are handled according to business rules
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application consistently handles leading and trailing spaces according to implemented business behavior and the observed authentication result is displayed without causing UI errors or unstable state transitions.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Password field is case-sensitive for authentication
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: Authentication fails for incorrectly cased password input and the Login page remains displayed with authentication error feedback.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Back button returns the user from Login page to Home page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application returns the user to the Home page in guest state without authenticating the session.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home button returns the user from Login page to Home page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application returns the user to the Home page in guest state and the Login page is closed.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify authenticated Home state displays logged-in user identity after successful login
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Home page displays authenticated-user UI, the guest Person/Profile button is replaced with the logged-in user name, and authenticated-only features become available.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify long Username input value is rejected without breaking the Login page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Login page remains stable, authentication does not succeed with invalid long Username input, and validation or authentication error feedback is displayed.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify long Password input value is rejected without exposing password text
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Password field remains masked, authentication fails for invalid long password input, and the Login page remains functional with visible error feedback.

validations: The Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Login page.
Authentication fails, an error message is displayed, the application remains on the Login page or unauthenticated state, and authenticated Home controls are not shown.
Authentication fails, visible error feedback is displayed, and the user remains unauthenticated on the Login page.
The login attempt is rejected with visible authentication error feedback and the application does not transition to authenticated Home state.
Required field validation is displayed for Username and Password, login does not proceed, and the user remains on the Login page.
A Username required validation message is displayed, authentication is blocked, and the Login page remains open.
A Password required validation message is displayed, login is not processed, and the user remains on the Login page.
The application treats whitespace-only values as invalid input, prevents authentication, and displays validation or authentication error feedback while remaining on the Login page.

The application consistently handles leading and trailing spaces according to implemented business behavior and the observed authentication result is displayed without causing UI errors or unstable state transitions.
Authentication fails for incorrectly cased password input and the Login page remains displayed with authentication error feedback.
The Login page remains stable, authentication does not succeed with invalid long Username input, and validation or authentication error feedback is displayed.
The Password field remains masked, authentication fails for invalid long password input, and the Login page remains functional with visible error feedback.
transitions: The Login page opens from the Home page and displays the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button in an interactive state.

The application authenticates the user successfully, returns to the Home page, removes the guest Home state, replaces the Person/Profile button with the logged-in user identity, and displays authenticated-user features.
Authentication fails, an error message is displayed, the application remains on the Login page or unauthenticated state, and authenticated Home controls are not shown.
Authentication fails, visible error feedback is displayed, and the user remains unauthenticated on the Login page.
The login attempt is rejected with visible authentication error feedback and the application does not transition to authenticated Home state.
A Username required validation message is displayed, authentication is blocked, and the Login page remains open.
The application returns the user to the Home page in guest state without authenticating the session.
The application returns the user to the Home page in guest state and the Login page is closed.
The Home page displays authenticated-user UI, the guest Person/Profile button is replaced with the logged-in user name, and authenticated-only features become available.

wrapperExpectations: Reuse approved shared/common wrapper keywords before low-level SeleniumLibrary actions.
Do not invent suite-level custom keywords; compose from approved upstream resource knowledge.

mustNotInvent: duplicate ownership for controls already owned in approved upstream resources
hardcoded workflow routing or mapped page logic in Python
downstreamGuidance.generationRule: Downstream generation must consume approved workflow knowledge plus approved resource context before creating new artifacts.
